name: football-academy-manager-pro-render
description: He thong quan ly hoc vien bong da - GitHub + Render deployment

scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix backend --no-audit --no-fund && npm ci --prefix frontend --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.render:start: npm --prefix backend run db:sync && npm --prefix backend run bootstrap:admin && npm --prefix backend run start
